Pariprashnena — Q&A Archive

A read-only archive of 1,235 questions and 14,977 answers from a Gauḍīya Vaiṣṇava forum (2007–2012).

Parampara picture

Other · asked by user [] · 2007-09-08 · 10 answers
Hare Krishna Prabhus,
please, could someone advice me some web page, where I can download complete picture of ISKCON parampara from Six Goswamis to Shrila Bhaktisiddhanta Sarasvati?
Thank you,
ys Ondrej
user [168] · 2007-09-08
ask HH Danavir Goswami from kansas
Danavir Goswami

Rupanuga Vedic College
5201 Paseo, Kansas City, Missouri 64110
Tel: (816) 924-5619, (800) 340-5286, Fax: (816) 924-5640
E-mail: danavir.goswami@pamho.net Website: www.rvc.edu
Skype: DanavirGoswami
user [33] · 2007-09-08
I purchased the poster from the RVC website store a few months back. It is very nice!

[quote][cite] krishnadas:[/cite]ask HH Danavir Goswami from kansas

user [38] · 2007-09-09
Or search Google Images for individual names.
user [29] · 2007-09-09
Thank you VEDA Prabhu, finally I have done it this way.
user [2] · 2007-09-09
could you post links you found, anupatha?

user [38] · 2007-09-10
Just wondering how many of these pics show the real look of those acaryas. Up to Bhaktivinoda Thakura there are photographs available and there are some old paintings of Sri Caitanyas associates but what about the others?
user [24] · 2007-09-11
VEDA: dunno.
user [2] · 2007-09-11
ekendra prabhuji and others, any pics with higher resolution for printing altar?
user [29] · 2007-09-12
I have downloaded individually these, according to VEDAs instructions, but only from Six Goswamis to Srila Bhaktisiddhanta Sarasvati. In doc file they are prepared in extra small version for printing on altar, but its possible to make them bigger :-)
